message:
feat(extensions): add static compat-scan for JS registrations + expand proptest coverage (bd-388hn)

This commit contains two related extension system improvements:

1. STATIC COMPAT-SCAN FOR EXTENSION REGISTRATION (feature)

   Adds a pre-runtime static source analysis pass that scans JS extension
   entry files for registerTool() and registerCommand() calls before the
   QuickJS runtime executes. This addresses a compatibility gap where some
   extensions register tools/commands dynamically during activation but
   the snapshot-based loading model may not capture these registrations.

   New types and functions:
   - CompatRegistrationHints: Collects command names, tool name literals,
     and whether tool registration exists in the source.
   - build_compat_registration_hints(): Scans all extension specs' entry
     files using regex-based extraction of registerCommand/registerTool
     call sites.
   - apply_compat_registration_hints(): Injects placeholder tool/command
     definitions for extensions that declare registrations in source but
     didn't produce them during snapshot loading.
   - compat_static_registration_enabled(): Gated behind the
     ext-conformance feature flag or PI_EXT_COMPAT_SCAN env var.
   - sanitize_tool_name_segment(), infer_compat_tool_name(): Generate
     safe tool names from extension IDs when no literal name is found.

   The scan uses two compiled regexes (OnceLock) to extract literal
   string arguments from registerCommand("name") and registerTool({name:
   "name"}) patterns, handling both pi.registerX() and bare registerX()
   call styles.

2. PROPTEST EXPANSION FOR HOSTCALL DISPATCH (FUZZ-P1.9, bd-388hn)

   Extends the existing proptest_dispatch module with 9 new test
   functions (267 lines) covering previously untested hostcall paths:

   - register_provider_malformed_never_panics: 256 cases with missing
     fields, empty strings, null values, wrong types, random API strings.
   - register_command_arbitrary_never_panics: Arbitrary Unicode command
     names and optional descriptions.
   - register_flag_arbitrary_never_panics: Arbitrary flag names with
     optional defaults of various JSON types.
   - session_append_entry_never_panics: Custom session entry types with
     arbitrary JSON data payloads.
   - session_set_label_arbitrary_never_panics: Arbitrary target IDs and
     label values.
   - session_set_model_roundtrip: Verifies provider/model survive the
     MockSession round-trip.
   - dispatch_large_payload_stress: 200-key JSON objects dispatched
     through random operations.
   - dispatch_deeply_nested_payload_never_panics: Deterministic test with
     10/25/50 nesting levels.
   - register_provider_valid_api_types_succeed: Positive test for all 4
     valid API type strings.
   - register_provider_invalid_api_types_error: Negative test confirming
     rejection of invalid API types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
